scenes.title: Login and patient-scoped record
scenes.what_to_show: Login as P001 and confirm the dashboard only exposes that patient journey.
scenes.talk_track: Role isolation and patient scoping are part of the safety story.

scenes.title: Longitudinal treatment timeline
scenes.what_to_show: Scroll the timeline from treatment cycles to labs, symptoms, and imaging.
scenes.talk_track: The central object is a patient timeline, not a generic chatbot transcript.

scenes.title: Deterministic safety before LLM
scenes.what_to_show: Point at CBC and symptom risk flags before opening the support agent.
scenes.talk_track: CBC and symptom thresholds generate review flags before any language model response.

scenes.title: Support agent routing
scenes.what_to_show: Ask a casual question, a RAG education question, then provide a clear symptom or lab record.

evidence.rag_prompt: what does pCR mean in breast cancer monitoring?

scenes.talk_track: The agent routes between conversation, grounded education, and explicit data-entry tools.

scenes.title: Clinician review and audit trail
scenes.what_to_show: Open clinician queue, select the patient, approve/edit/reject the AI summary.

evidence.queue_reason: risk flags and monitoring score drive the review queue

scenes.talk_track: The system surfaces signals; the clinician remains the decision-maker.

scenes.title: Admin/MLE governance
scenes.what_to_show: Open eval panels: RAG ablation, agent traces, MLE readiness, calibration, errors, latency.
scenes.talk_track: The portfolio value is the observable AI lifecycle, not just the final answer.

demo_prompts.rag_prompt: what does pCR mean in breast cancer monitoring?

claim_boundary: Synthetic demo only. The platform is non-diagnostic and requires clinician review.
